movie.title: Dog 51 (2025) Dual Audio [Hindi ORG & French] WEB-DL 480p, 720p & 1080p | GDRive
movie.synopsis: In the near future, Paris is divided into three zones that separate social classes, and no one can escape ALMA, a predictive AI that has revolutionized law enforcement. When ALMA’s creator is assassinated, Salia, a top agent, and Zem, a jaded cop, are forced to work together to solve a murder that may expose the dark secrets of the system they serve.
